mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, course_id, course_title, original_amount, discount_amount, pay_amount, status, request_id, created_at, updated_at, paid_at, closed_at, deleted FROM edu_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND request_id = #{requestId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, order_no, user_id, course_id, course_title, original_amount, discount_amount, pay_amount, status, request_id, created_at, updated_at, paid_at, closed_at, deleted FROM edu_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_order (order_no, user_id, course_id, course_title, original_amount, discount_amount, pay_amount, status, request_id, created_at, updated_at, paid_at, closed_at, deleted) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{courseId}, #{courseTitle}, #{originalAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{status}, #{requestId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{paidAt}, #{closedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_order SET status = 'CLOSED', closed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND status = 'UNPAID' AND deleted = 0
